why_it_matters: A documented inability to obtain needed care directly affects whether the patient can fill his new prescription and complete the dental referral, and should shape the care plan.
Seasonal/migrant farm work history is a completeness element of the PRAPARE screen and may carry occupational exposure relevance, but has limited immediate impact on this visit's management.
Documenting safety-netting for worsening grief/depression is important given the borderline PHQ-2 and recent bereavement, ensuring a clear plan for escalation if mood deteriorates.
